channel.title: 专家委员会 | Expert Committee on Beijing Digital Health Research Institute
channel.description: Recent content in 专家委员会 | Expert Committee on Beijing Digital Health Research Institute

item.title: 孙七教授 | Prof. Sun Qi
item.description:
孙七教授 | Prof. Sun Qi

基本信息 | Basic Information

  • 姓名 | Name: 孙七 | Sun Qi
  • 职称 | Title: 教授 | Professor
  • 职务 | Position: 研究会秘书长 | Secretary General of BJDHR
  • 所属机构 | Affiliation: 中国标准化研究院

研究领域 | Research Fields

  • 数字健康标准 | Digital Health Standards
  • 医疗信息化 | Medical Informatization
  • 数据安全与隐私 | Data Security and Privacy

个人简介 | Biography

孙七教授长期从事医疗健康信息化标准研究，主持制定国家标准10余项，参与国际标准制定3项。在健康数据安全与隐私保护方面有深入研究。

Prof. Sun Qi has long been engaged in medical health informatization standards research, leading the formulation of over 10 national standards and participating in 3 international standards. He has in-depth research on health data security and privacy protection.

item.title: 张三教授 | Prof. Zhang San
item.description:
张三教授 | Prof. Zhang San

基本信息 | Basic Information

  • 姓名 | Name: 张三 | Zhang San
  • 职称 | Title: 教授、博士生导师 | Professor, PhD Supervisor
  • 职务 | Position: 研究会理事长 | President of BJDHR
  • 所属机构 | Affiliation: 北京大学健康医疗大数据国家研究院

研究领域 | Research Fields

  • 健康医疗大数据 | Health Big Data
  • 数字医疗技术 | Digital Medical Technology
  • 智慧医院建设 | Smart Hospital Construction

个人简介 | Biography

张三教授是数字健康领域的知名专家，长期从事健康医疗大数据研究。主持国家重点研发计划项目3项，发表SCI论文50余篇，获得国家科技进步二等奖1项。

Prof. Zhang San is a renowned expert in digital health, specializing in health big data research. He has led 3 National Key R&D Program projects, published over 50 SCI papers, and received 1 Second Prize of National Science and Technology Progress Award.

item.title: 李四博士 | Dr. Li Si
item.description:
李四博士 | Dr. Li Si

基本信息 | Basic Information

  • 姓名 | Name: 李四 | Li Si
  • 职称 | Title: 研究员 | Researcher
  • 职务 | Position: 研究会副理事长 | Vice President of BJDHR
  • 所属机构 | Affiliation: 清华大学人工智能研究院

研究领域 | Research Fields

  • 医疗人工智能 | Medical AI
  • 机器学习 | Machine Learning
  • 健康预测模型 | Health Prediction Models

个人简介 | Biography

李四博士专注于人工智能在医疗健康领域的应用研究。在Nature Medicine、The Lancet Digital Health等顶级期刊发表论文20余篇，开发的多项AI辅助诊断系统已在国内多家医院应用。

Dr. Li Si focuses on AI applications in healthcare. He has published over 20 papers in top journals including Nature Medicine and The Lancet Digital Health. Multiple AI-assisted diagnostic systems developed by his team have been deployed in hospitals across China.

item.title: 王五教授 | Prof. Wang Wu
item.description:
王五教授 | Prof. Wang Wu

基本信息 | Basic Information

  • 姓名 | Name: 王五 | Wang Wu
  • 职称 | Title: 教授 | Professor
  • 职务 | Position: 专家委员会委员 | Committee Member
  • 所属机构 | Affiliation: 北京航空航天大学

研究领域 | Research Fields

  • 健康物联网 | Health Internet of Things
  • 可穿戴设备 | Wearable Devices
  • 远程健康监测 | Remote Health Monitoring

个人简介 | Biography

王五教授是健康物联网领域的领军人物，研发的智能健康监测设备已服务超过100万用户。主持国家重点研发计划"数字诊疗装备"专项。

Prof. Wang Wu is a leading figure in health IoT. The intelligent health monitoring devices developed by his team have served over 1 million users. He leads the National Key R&D Program “Digital Diagnosis and Treatment Equipment” project.

item.title: 赵六博士 | Dr. Zhao Liu
item.description:
赵六博士 | Dr. Zhao Liu

基本信息 | Basic Information

  • 姓名 | Name: 赵六 | Zhao Liu
  • 职称 | Title: 副教授 | Associate Professor
  • 职务 | Position: 专家委员会委员 | Committee Member
  • 所属机构 | Affiliation: 中国人民大学统计学院

研究领域 | Research Fields

  • 健康大数据分析 | Health Big Data Analytics
  • 流行病学建模 | Epidemiological Modeling
  • 公共卫生决策支持 | Public Health Decision Support

个人简介 | Biography

赵六博士擅长健康大数据分析与流行病学建模，在新冠疫情期间为北京市政府提供了重要的决策支持。发表高水平论文30余篇，H指数25。

Dr. Zhao Liu specializes in health big data analytics and epidemiological modeling. During the COVID-19 pandemic, he provided crucial decision support to the Beijing Municipal Government. He has published over 30 high-impact papers with an H-index of 25.
